item.title: Our NFL offseason trade grades: Did the Rams give up too much to acquire Trent McDuffie?
item.description: We're handing out report cards on big offseason moves, including the Chiefs sending CB Trent McDuffie to the Rams.

item.title: Sources: Chiefs trade top CB McDuffie to Rams
item.description: The Chiefs have agreed to a blockbuster trade with the Rams to send All-Pro cornerback Trent McDuffie to Los Angeles for four draft picks, including t...

item.title: NCAA tourneys to require player availability info
item.description: For the men's and women's NCAA tournaments, teams must submit initial availability reports the night before a game and provide updates two hours prior...

item.title: WNBPA exec committee: 'United' amid CBA talks
item.description: The WNBPA's executive committee said it remains "united" and that a recent player survey reaffirms the league's latest proposal for a new CBA "is not ...

item.title: Chargers release Becton, save $9.7M against cap
item.description: The Chargers released guard Mekhi Becton in a move that saved them $9.7 million against the salary cap.
